_comment: OUI → vendor lookup, generated from https://standards-oui.ieee.org/oui/oui.csv via Scripts/generate-oui-bundle.py. Restricted to MA-L registry entries (24-bit OUI; the only assignment class whose first 3 bytes uniquely identify the vendor). Vendor names are normalized to short display forms (e.g. 'Cisco' not 'Cisco Systems, Inc.').
